textByHash.0cd94f3f5dcfab7dc0c3bf6fff8dc5bd110c59e6: Foolish JalYt, I am TzHaar-Mej, one of the mystics of this city.
textByHash.0e756222545ff1b2fb345c16b18fc1bc713746a8: What ever you say, crazy JalYt!
textByHash.414820b79e821ebc3309d1fa6f7bdad5a0fe3f6b: That what you are... you agile and quick no?
textByHash.458e56d2af35ae795fbe4d29c81533aa0fc80305: That what you are... you user of mystic powers no?
textByHash.60ea8c8ed988a95e40290ab77c913a3e421f469d: That what you are... you tough and strong no?
textByHash.91ed756d14591822e9dfdea360ef7f16d4044408: That what you are... you skilled at making things no?
textByHash.b6092bd03893b93fa754719bf13f08fd5101d71d: There are the mighty TzHaar-Ket who guard us, the swift TzHaar-Xil who hunt for our food, and the skilled TzHaar-Hur who craft our homes and tools.
